text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I don't believe we have a meeting scheduled for
this time slot, do we?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: A chat? No, I don't mind. It's just...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I am unaccustomed to conversation outside of
scheduled time. Apologies. I'll be sure to account
for chats in my schedule going forward.
